message:
fix(clippy): replace manual Default impls with derive and fix PathBuf→Path

- ars_intercept: derive Default for ContextBounds
- byte_compression: derive Default for CompressionLevel with #[default]
- plan: derive Default for MissionLifecycleState with #[default]
- planner_features: derive Default for BeadGovernorState, use struct init
- mcp_helpers: &PathBuf → &Path in record_mcp_audit_sync signature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -431,7 +431,7 @@ pub(super) async fn record_mcp_audit(
 /// Opens a StorageHandle, records the audit, and closes it.
 /// Fire-and-forget: errors are logged, never propagated.
 pub(super) fn record_mcp_audit_sync(
-    db_path: &PathBuf,
+    db_path: &Path,
     tool_name: &str,
     args: &serde_json::Value,
     ok: bool,
